cuts.inequality: t <= 1/2*alpha + beta + gamma + s1 + s2 + u1 + 1/2*u2
t <= alpha + 2*beta + gamma + s1 + u1 + u2
t <= alpha + beta + 2*gamma + s1 + u1 + u2
t <= alpha + beta + gamma + s1 + u1 + u2
t <= alpha + beta + gamma + u1 + u2

notes: The LP is the public-dual augmentation after an optimal public-dual star certificate on {a,l_i}.
Only the star leaf/a frequency residuals s_i are imported from the star face.
The b vertex keeps its public frequency capacity beta; the target bound is independent of beta.

public_only_constraint_boundary: Uses only R/Q variables, capping rows, frequency rows, and nonnegative variable domains. It does not use H1/H2/refined-Z/path-monotonicity/ancestry-transitivity/LCA-separation constraints.
